inferred_research_questions.question: Does separating decision-ready review from advisory intake reduce review-cycle time?
inferred_research_questions.why_it_matters: The pilot should rest on cycle-time evidence, not preference.

inferred_research_questions.question: Does narrower intake reduce avoidable rework?
inferred_research_questions.why_it_matters: The draft currently makes this claim more strongly than the evidence supports.

research_plan.depth_rationale: The paper is an internal decision memo with meaningful operating consequences.
research_plan.source_mode_rationale: The fixture uses synthetic internal source identifiers only.
research_plan.user_feedback: Fact-check requires additional research for the rework claim.

research_brief.executive_summary: Cycle-time evidence supports a bounded pilot; rework-reduction evidence is partial and needs follow-up.
key_findings: Decision-ready packet reviews were faster in the synthetic sample.
Packet completeness improved in the synthetic sample.
Avoidable rework is plausible but not directly proven by the current sources.

source_registry.title: Synthetic Review Packet Sample
source_registry.bias_or_agenda: Synthetic fixture data created for tests.

claim_support.rationale: Contains cycle-time comparison for the synthetic packet sample.
Mentions rework categories but does not prove avoided rework.

source_registry.title: Synthetic Packet Completeness Log
source_registry.bias_or_agenda: Synthetic fixture data created for tests.

claim_support.rationale: Shows more complete packets in the synthetic pilot group.
Completeness may relate to rework but does not directly measure it.

source_registry.notes: Supports packet completeness, not avoided rework.

evidence_matrix.claim: Decision-ready packet review is faster than mixed advisory intake in the synthetic sample.
The pilot will reduce avoidable rework.
evidence_matrix.notes: Needs additional research before revision or export.

source_summaries.S1: Synthetic packet sample supports a cycle-time comparison.
source_summaries.S2: Synthetic completeness log supports a related packet-quality signal.

rows.implication: The cycle-time claim can remain with scope qualifiers.

source_summaries.S1: Mentions rework categories without direct avoided-rework measurement.

rows.implication: The rework claim should route back to research.

open_questions: What source directly measures avoided rework after intake changes?
draft_support_notes: Keep cycle-time claims scoped to the synthetic sample.
Do not claim rework reduction until follow-up research exists.
facts_safe_to_use: The synthetic sample supports a cycle-time comparison for decision-ready packets.
claims_to_soften: The pilot may reduce avoidable rework if follow-up research supports the causal link.
claims_to_drop_or_reframe: The pilot will reduce avoidable rework.
